{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Spear of the Golden Sun
| introduced = Underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Spear of the Golden Sun]] is a technique from a [[Path]] of light and fire.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
